siteGoal: Help teams choose and finish their most important work
positioning: A calmer planning workspace for teams that value focus

features.title: Clear priorities
features.text: Turn competing requests into one shared order of work.

features.title: Protected focus
features.text: Keep urgent noise from displacing important progress.

features.title: Visible momentum
features.text: See meaningful work move from intent to done.

faq.question: Can we import existing projects?
faq.answer: Yes. Guided imports preserve ownership and status.

faq.question: Can we cancel at any time?
faq.answer: Yes. Plans have no long-term lock-in.
